matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: APC truncating-variant model (APC Wnt-restraint loss model)
APC I1307K model (APC colorectal-risk modifier model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a APC Wnt pathway tumor-suppressor review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology and Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed APC truncating-variant model dosage suggests this sample carries the APC prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a APC Wnt pathway tumor-suppressor review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology and Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. This specific marker is curated as APC Wnt-restraint loss model. APC truncating-variant model is curated as a APC marker for Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched APC truncating-variant model at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the APC prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a APC Wnt pathway tumor-suppressor review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology and Familial adenomatous polyposis review context, Colorectal tumor-suppressor biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. An observed APC variant places this sample in the curated APC research context. The local APC bundle is Wnt pathway tumor-suppressor review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls. APC variants can alter or tag Wnt/beta-catenin restraint, cell adhesion, chromosome segregation, intestinal stem-cell control, and colorectal tumor biology; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta

This pattern leans toward stronger regulatory restraint or reduced local accessibility around the locus.
